summary: Completed backend testing for Midwife Prenatal Visit Assessment feature. All 20 tests PASSED. All CRUD endpoints working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: GET /api/midwife/clients/{client_id}/prenatal-visits returns list of visits sorted by date descending
VERIFIED: POST /api/midwife/clients/{client_id}/prenatal-visits creates visit with all fields (vitals + well-being scores)
VERIFIED: GET /api/midwife/clients/{client_id}/prenatal-visits/{visit_id} returns single visit details
VERIFIED: PUT /api/midwife/clients/{client_id}/prenatal-visits/{visit_id} updates visit and regenerates summary
VERIFIED: Summary auto-generated with format: 'BP {value}, FHR {value}, FH {value} cm, Wt {value} {unit}'
VERIFIED: Well-being scores (eating, water, emotional, physical, mental, spiritual) persist with notes
VERIFIED: Auth required (401) and client ownership verified (404) on all endpoints
Code quality: Endpoints use proper async/await, exclude MongoDB _id, return proper status codes
seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up during tests. Existing test client: client_4e6f8101b891, existing visit: pv_8c4299012542
context_for_next_testing_agent: Prenatal visit assessment CRUD API fully tested and working. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_prenatal_visits.py covers all 5 endpoints plus summary generation and well-being scores persistence.

TestPrenatalVisitsAPI.test_create_prenatal_visit_with_all_fiel: PASSED - All 20+ fields including well-being scores
TestPrenatalVisitsAPI.test_create_visit_minimal_data: PASSED - Only client_id and visit_date required

TestSummaryGeneration.test_summary_includes_all_vitals: PASSED - 'BP, FHR, FH, Wt' all included

TestWellBeingScores.test_all_wellbeing_scores_persist: PASSED - All 6 scores (eating, water, emotional, physical, mental, spiritual) with notes
